Definition: Average revenue per user per month
% of MRR lost per month (before expansion)
% of MRR lost per month (after expansion)
Retention including expansion from existing customers
Formula: (Starting MRR + Expansion - Contraction - Churn) / Starting MRR

Definition: Lifetime value from cohort retention curves
Formula: Sum of cohort revenue over life

Notes: 3.0x or higher is healthy for SaaS

Definition: Months to recover CAC at contribution margin

Formula: (Change in ARR * 4) / S&M spend in prior quarter
